# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis
spec:
  hosts:
  - "third-party-api.com"
  ports:
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis
spec:
  hosts:
  - "third-party-api.com"
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: third-party-api.com
        port:
          number: 80
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-databases
spec:
  hosts:
  - "external-database.com"
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: postgres
    protocol: POSTGRES
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-databases
spec:
  hosts:
  - "external-database.com"
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: external-database.com
        port:
          number: 5432
